results.title: PURPLE STYLE LABS | DEBT FUNDING — Sales Pitch (English)
results.content:
Headline: India's Luxury Boom Play — 45% Gross Margins, Zero Listed Competition, Pre-IPO Lock at 6.4x Revenue

Elevator: Purple Style Labs owns Pernia's Pop-Up Shop — India's #1 omni-channel luxury fashion destination, scaling 11x from FY21 to FY24 and targeting ₹1,600 Cr by FY29. This NCD offers 12-month fixed-income exposure to a monopolistic platform riding India's fastest-growing luxury segment — projected to hit $85–90 Bn by 2030 — with a marquee cap table (Binny Bansal, Bajaj Holdings, Utpal Sheth-RARE), imminent 12–18 month IPO, and breakeven-to-double-digit EBITDA inflection already underway.

Ideal Client: ₹50L–5Cr ticket HNI / family office with 12–24 month horizon, appetite for structured credit in high-growth private cos, seeking pre-IPO exposure with downside protection and comfort in consumption-led India themes.

results.title: Bharat Value Fund Series VI (Fund Of Fund) — Sales Pitch (English)
results.content:
R 1–10 crore deployment capacity, 5+ year horizon, appetite for structured illiquidity in exchange for pre-IPO re-rating alpha, and comfort with actively governed unlisted equity.

Unique Selling Points:
- Proven Track Record: Series I returned 2.8x MOIC in 24 months; Consumer Electricals exited at 8.6x (300%+ IRR) in 17 months.
- Active Value Creation Engine: Board representation, CXO placement, M&A execution, IPO readiness — 100% adherence across prior funds.
- AI-Powered Deal Sourcing: Proprietary Leadzen.ai + QUBOID quant filters + 8,000-company network = asymmetric pre-IPO alpha unavailable to retail PMS/MF.
- Blended Liquidity Model: Up to 30% in listed anchors (49.9% regulatory cap) ensures portfolio liquidity while majority captures unlisted multiples expansion.
- Institutional-Grade Governance: Deloitte auditor, SEBI Cat-II registration, seasoned IC with 60+ combined years (ex-Edelweiss, Bajaj Allianz, SP Growth HK), independent board oversight.
